last_action: Implemented flexible 3-category payment system (Cash, PromptPay list, Bank Transfer list) with choice-based tenant flow.
summary: Phase 8: Security & UI Refinement. Overhauled payment configuration to support multiple PromptPay and Bank accounts. Redesigned Tenant Bill UI with a choice-based flow, dynamic QR generation, and copyable bank details. Automated LINE Flex Message receipts are fully integrated into all payment workflows.
next_steps: Test the full 'Forgot Password' flow with actual SMTP settings.
Conduct a security audit of all admin endpoints to ensure 'get_admin' dependency is applied everywhere.
Refine the 'Move-out' workflow including final meter readings and pro-rated billing.
Implement building-level filtering for financial reports.

team_notes.Gemini-CLI: The system is now significantly more secure with hashed passwords and lockout protection. UI clarity improved by splitting meter and repair sections. Direct bcrypt usage resolved passlib compatibility bugs.
